messages.say:
In SQL, DML (Data Manipulation Language) is a subset of SQL commands used to manipulate data stored in database tables. It allows users to insert, update, delete, and retrieve data.


Here’s how SQL works as a DML:



✅ 1. SELECT – Retrieve Data


Used to fetch data from one or more tables.


SELECT * FROM employees;
SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'HR';


Doesn't change data.

Most common DML command.



✅ 2. INSERT – Add New Data


Used to insert new rows into a table.


INSERT INTO employees (name, department, salary)
VALUES ('Ali', 'Sales', 50000);


Adds one or more records to a table.



✅ 3. UPDATE – Modify Existing Data


Used to modify existing data in a table.


UPDATE employees
SET salary = 55000
WHERE name = 'Ali';


Can update one or more rows based on a condition.



✅ 4. DELETE – Remove Data


Used to delete rows from a table.


DELETE FROM employees
WHERE department = 'Sales';


Deletes one or more rows based on condition.

Note: Does not remove the table structure.



🔄 Summary Table:

Command
Purpose
Affects Data?
Example Use
SELECT
Retrieve data
❌ No
View employee list
INSERT
Add new data
✅ Yes
Add new employee
UPDATE
Modify existing data
✅ Yes
Change salary
DELETE
Remove data
✅ Yes
Delete employees from Sales


🧠 Notes:


DML operations can be rolled back if used inside a transaction.

Most DML queries affect only the data, not the schema.


Let me know if you want examples in Urdu or using a specific table!

Zaroor Abdullah! Yahaan main tumhein SQL DML (Data Manipulation Language) ko Roman Urdu mein asaani se samjhaata hoon:



🔹 DML ka Matlab kya hai?


DML ka matlab hai Data Manipulation Language – is ka kaam hota hai data ko insert karna, update karna, delete karna aur retrieve (select) karna kisi database ke table mein.



✅ 1. SELECT – Data ko dekhna ya read karna


SELECT * FROM employees;


Matlab: Sab employees ka data uthao.


SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'HR';


Matlab: Sirf un logon ke naam aur salary dikhao jo HR department mein hain.


🟢 Ye sirf data read karta hai, kuch change nahi karta.



✅ 2. INSERT – Naya data dalna


INSERT INTO employees (name, department, salary)
VALUES ('Ali', 'Sales', 50000);


Matlab: Naya employee "Ali" jiska department Sales hai aur salary 50,000 hai, usay table mein daal do.


🟢 Ye naya data add karta hai.



✅ 3. UPDATE – Purane data ko change karna


UPDATE employees
SET salary = 55000
WHERE name = 'Ali';


Matlab: Ali ki salary ko 55,000 kar do.


🟢 Ye pehle se mojood data ko update karta hai.



✅ 4. DELETE – Data ko mitaana


DELETE FROM employees
WHERE department = 'Sales';


Matlab: Saare employees jo Sales department mein hain, unka data delete kar do.


🟢 Ye data hataata hai, lekin table khatam nahi karta.



🔄 Ek Nazar mein Table:

Command
Kaam kya karta hai
Data change karta hai?
Example ka Matlab
SELECT
Data ko dekhna / read karna
❌ Nahi
Employees ka record dekhna
INSERT
Naya data dalna
✅ Haan
Naya employee record add karna
UPDATE
Purane data ko badalna
✅ Haan
Salary ya naam change karna
DELETE
Data hataana (rows ko)
✅ Haan
Kisi department ke log delete karna


Agar tumhein koi specific example chahiye ya apne table par DML lagana seekhna hai, to batao – main madad karta hoon!

Zaroor Abdullah! Ab main tumhein SQL DML ki theory Roman Urdu mein simple aur asaan alfaaz mein explain karta hoon:



🔷 SQL DML – Theory in Roman Urdu



📌 SQL kya hai?


SQL (Structured Query Language) ek language hai jo databases ke saath kaam karne ke liye use hoti hai. Is ka kaam hota hai data ko:


store karna

retrieve (nikalna)

update (badalna)

delete (hatana)


SQL kai categories mein divide hoti hai, jin mein se ek hai:
👉 DML – Data Manipulation Language



📌 DML kya hota hai?


DML ka full form hai Data Manipulation Language.
Ye SQL ke wo commands hain jo database ke andar mojood data par kaam karte hain.


Iska kaam hota hai:


Data ko insert karna (naya record daalna)

Data ko update karna (purana record badalna)

Data ko delete karna (record hataana)

Data ko select karna (record dekhna ya nikalna)



📌 DML ke main 4 commands:


1. SELECT


Data ko database se read ya fetch karne ke liye use hota hai.
Ye sirf data dikhata hai, change nahi karta.


SELECT * FROM students;



2. INSERT


Database mein naya record add karne ke liye use hota hai.


INSERT INTO students (name, class) VALUES ('Ali', '10th');



3. UPDATE


Kisi existing record ko update karne ke liye use hota hai.


UPDATE students SET class = '11th' WHERE name = 'Ali';



4. DELETE


Kisi record ko permanently delete karne ke liye use hota hai.


DELETE FROM students WHERE name = 'Ali';



📌 DML ki khas baat kya hai?


Ye data par kaam karta hai, structure par nahi (matlab table banata ya mitata nahi).

DML commands transactions ka hissa hoti hain — iska matlab hai ke tum COMMIT ya ROLLBACK kar ke changes save ya undo kar sakte ho.

Ye real-world apps jaise school systems, e-commerce, banking software mein use hoti hain jab bhi data change hota hai.



🔄 Ek simple example life se:


Socho ek school ka record system hai:


Jab naya student admission leta hai → INSERT

Jab student ki class badalti hai → UPDATE

Jab student school se chala jata hai → DELETE

Jab principal kisi student ka record dekhta hai → SELECT



Agar tum chaho to main iska Urdu notes version bhi bana kar de sakta hoon PDF ya text ke form mein.

Zaroor Abdullah! Neeche main tumhein SQL DML (Data Manipulation Language) par aik complete essay jese explanation deta hoon Roman Urdu mein. Ye explanation tum assignments, presentations ya exams mein bhi use kar sakte ho.



SQL DML (Data Manipulation Language) – Ek Mukammal Essay (Roman Urdu)


🔰 Taaruf (Introduction)


Aaj ke digital daur mein, har organization ka data ek asset hota hai. Is data ko manage karne ke liye Database Management Systems (DBMS) ka use hota hai. Aur jab baat ho data se interact karne ki – to sabse zyada use hone wali language hai SQL (Structured Query Language).


SQL ko mukhtalif categories mein divide kiya gaya hai jaise:


DDL (Data Definition Language),

DML (Data Manipulation Language),

DCL (Data Control Language), aur

TCL (Transaction Control Language).


Is essay mein hum DML (Data Manipulation Language) par focus karenge jo SQL ka wo hissa hai jo data ke saath directly kaam karta hai.



💡 DML ka Maqsad (Purpose of DML)


DML ka basic maqsad hota hai database ke andar mojood data ko manipulate karna. Manipulate karne ka matlab hai:


naya data insert karna,

purane data ko update karna,

unwanted data ko delete karna,

ya data ko sirf retrieve (read) karna.


Iska use har real-life application mein hota hai – banking apps, e-commerce websites, schools ke record systems, ya hospitals ke databases mein.



🔍 DML ke Ahamm Commands aur Unki Tafseel


🔹 1. SELECT – Data ko dekhna (Read/Retrieve)


SELECT command ka use hum tab karte hain jab humein kisi table se data nikalna ya dekhna ho. Is command se hum specific rows, columns ya pura data dekh sakte hain.


Example:


SELECT name, class FROM students WHERE class = '10th';


Matlab: Sirf un students ka naam aur class dikhao jo 10th class mein hain.


Ye command non-destructive hoti hai – iska matlab hai ke ye sirf data dikhati hai, change nahi karti.



🔹 2. INSERT – Naya data daalna


INSERT command ka use hum naya record add karne ke liye karte hain. Jab bhi koi naya user ya entry database mein add hoti hai, to INSERT ka use hota hai.


Example:


INSERT INTO students (name, class, age) VALUES ('Ali', '10th', 15);


Is command se student "Ali" ka record database mein add ho jayega.



🔹 3. UPDATE – Purane data ko update karna


UPDATE command se hum kisi existing record ko modify kar sakte hain. Jaise agar kisi student ki class change ho gayi ho ya uski age update karni ho.


Example:


UPDATE students SET class = '11th' WHERE name = 'Ali';


Is command se Ali ki class 10th se 11th ho jayegi.



🔹 4. DELETE – Data ko hataana


DELETE command ka use unwanted data ko remove karne ke liye hota hai. Ye command records ko permanently delete kar deti hai agar usay rollback na kiya jaye.


Example:


DELETE FROM students WHERE age < 10;


Is command se saare students jinki age 10 se choti hai, unka data delete ho jayega.



🛠️ Transaction aur DML ka Rishta


DML commands aksar transactions ke andar hoti hain. Matlab jab hum INSERT, UPDATE, ya DELETE karte hain to hum COMMIT ya ROLLBACK use kar ke us change ko ya to save karte hain ya undo.


Example:


BEGIN;
UPDATE students SET age = 16 WHERE name = 'Ali';
ROLLBACK;


Is example mein Ali ki age change to ki gayi, lekin ROLLBACK ki wajah se wo change wapas ho gaya.



🧠 Real-Life Examples


School Management System: Jab naya student admit hota hai → INSERT, agar uski class change ho → UPDATE, agar wo chala jaye → DELETE, aur principal uska record dekhe → SELECT.

E-commerce Website: Jab customer order karta hai → INSERT, jab address update karta hai → UPDATE, jab order cancel hota hai → DELETE, aur jab admin order history dekhta hai → SELECT.



🔚 Natija (Conclusion)


DML SQL ka woh hissa hai jo database ke andar actual data ko control karta hai. Ye data ko insert, update, delete aur select karne ki sahulat deta hai. Har chhoti badi organization DML ka use karti hai apne data operations ke liye. Iski samajh aur practice ek database developer, software engineer, ya analyst ke liye bohat zaroori hoti hai.



Agar tum chaho to main is essay ka PDF version bhi bana ke de sakta hoon ya Urdu translation bhi likh deta hoon. Batao tumhein kya chahiye?
